body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Continue prompt-trigger line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-036](task-0103): Provider Bulkhead

## Purpose

Implement provider bulkhead isolation.

## Scope

- Bulkhead design
- Resource limits
- Failure isolation

## Implementation

1. Design bulkhead
2. Add limits
3. Isolate failures

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Bulkhead designed
2. Limits work
3. Failures isolated
